title: Izzy Middle Eastern Saskatoon Berries Stir-fry
description: A quick-fix salty and snappy dish featuring saskatoon berries in a mother-sauce base for an authentic Middle Eastern flavor profile. Suitable for shojin-ryō, made on a salt-block.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a salt-block pan over medium heat.
Add garlic and onion; sauté for about 2 minutes or until fragrant.
Gently add saskatoon berries to the pan. Stir-fry for another 3-5 minutes, adjusting heat as needed.
Remove from heat immediately to maintain freshness of berries.
Serve hot with a side of hummus for an extra boost of flavor.
